text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Zzz... zzz... Ah?! Ooh, I dozed off again! I just can't deal with tiny print like this...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Snowy days did see me holed up with a book, but
otherwise I was out pick'n wild greens, or fish'n by
the river—bein' active outdoors is more my speed.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
So I never was all too eager to read... But now?
Sitt'n in a cafe with a book all fancy like—that's
the kinda city girl I wanna be!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: All righty, I can do this! Zzz...
